html:
The Luxury Axe is a version of the normal Axe that has four times as much durability and requires Gold Nuggets instead of Flint, making it easily renewable. It requires 4 Twigs and 2 Gold Nuggets to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It has 400 uses, 4 times as many as the regular Axe. When used as a weapon it deals the same amount of damage as a regular Axe. It also has the same efficiency as the regular Axe, requiring 5, 10, and 15 chops to fell trees depending on their size.

Contents

  • 1 Comparison
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Gallery

Comparison

  • Consuming dishes with reduces the required number of chops by half. This effect does not apply to the Obsidian Axe.
  • The efficiency of the Shadow Maul varies depending on its level, so it is not listed in the table.
  • Some Characters has different effiency. For example, Wes works 0.5x efficiency and strong Wolfgang works 2x efficiency.

Usage

To chop down a Tree with the Axe, players can right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click the Tree (Or press "X" in the console edition). Once the player begins to chop the Tree, holding down the LMB or Spacebar will have the player character keep chopping until the Tree falls. Alternatively, one can chop faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing.

In addition to chopping down trees, Axes are used in the following crafting recipes.

Outside of chopping trees, the Axe can be a cheap tool to be used as a weapon for early game survival.

×2

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Ornate Nordic Axe skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Luxury Axe
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of an expensive axe.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Ornate Nordic Axe
A resplendent golden axe, its design reminiscent of days of yore.
See ingame

Trivia

  • The Luxury Axe was added in the October 2, 2012 update.
  • The Axe used to have a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine, while the Luxury Axe gave 1-35.
  • Lucy the Axe, a character-specific item, is given to Woodie upon spawn. It acts as an infinite durability Axe that chops Trees much faster but does less damage. 
  • When the Luxury Axe is equipped, a 'ding' sound can be heard. 
  • In reality, gold is not a practical metal to be used in tools or weapons as it is a soft metal; it would easily deform and break. This is often remarked when examined by some Characters.
  • Axes deal the same amount of damage as Boomerangs.

Gallery

  • Wilson wielding a Luxury Axe.
  • A Woodie figurine holding a Luxury Axe.
  • Original HD Luxury Axe icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

–Winona

–Wortox
“Gold very strong.”
–Wurt
“I feel like you could use gold for better things.”
–Walter
“What else will I use gold for around here?”
–Wanda

The Luxury Axe was added in the October 2, 2012 update.
The Axe used to have a value of 1-10 Science Points depending on its durability when used on a Science Machine, while the Luxury Axe gave 1-35.
Lucy the Axe, a character-specific item, is given to Woodie upon spawn. It acts as an infinite durability Axe that chops Trees much faster but does less damage.
When the Luxury Axe is equipped, a 'ding' sound can be heard.
In reality, gold is not a practical metal to be used in tools or weapons as it is a soft metal; it would easily deform and break. This is often remarked when examined by some Characters.
Axes deal the same amount of damage as Boomerangs.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rìu sang trọng là phiên bản của Rìu thông thường có độ bền gấp bốn lần và yêu cầu Vàng Thỏi thay vì Đá lửa, khiến nó dễ dàng tái tạo. Nó cần 4 Cành Cây và 2 Vàng Thỏi để chế tạo, và cần Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Nó có 400 công dụng, gấp 4 lần Rìu thông thường. Khi được sử dụng làm vũ khí, nó gây ra lượng sát thương tương đương với Rìu thông thường. Nó cũng có hiệu quả tương tự như Rìu thông thường, cần 5, 10 và 15 nhát để chặt cây tùy thuộc vào kích thước của chúng.
